Class Rating

java.lang.Object
com.aptcoursework.entity.Rating
public class Rating extends Object
Represents a user rating and review for a laptop product with associated metadata.
Author:
Sugam Rana Magar

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Rating()
    Default constructor that creates an empty Rating instance.
    Rating(int ratingID, int userID, int laptopID, int rating, String review, Timestamp ratingDate)
    Constructs a Rating instance with complete rating details including database identifiers.
    Rating(int ratingID, int userID, int laptopID, int rating, String review, Timestamp ratingDate, String username, String profileImage)
    Constructs a complete Rating instance with all fields including username.
    Rating(int userID, int laptopID, int rating, String review)
    Constructs a Rating instance with user, laptop, and review details.

  • Constructor Details

    • Rating

      public Rating()
      Default constructor that creates an empty Rating instance.

    • Rating

      public Rating(int userID, int laptopID, int rating, String review)
      Constructs a Rating instance with user, laptop, and review details. Used for creating new ratings without database-assigned values.
      Parameters:
      userID - identifier of the user submitting the rating
      laptopID - identifier of the rated laptop
      rating - numeric rating value
      review - text review content

    • Rating

      public Rating(int ratingID, int userID, int laptopID, int rating, String review, Timestamp ratingDate, String username, String profileImage)
      Constructs a complete Rating instance with all fields including username. Used for retrieving ratings from the database with additional user information.
      Parameters:
      ratingID - database primary key
      userID - identifier of the user who submitted the rating
      laptopID - identifier of the rated laptop
      rating - numeric rating value
      review - text review content
      ratingDate - timestamp of when the rating was submitted
      username - name of the user who submitted the rating

    • Rating

      public Rating(int ratingID, int userID, int laptopID, int rating, String review, Timestamp ratingDate)
      Constructs a Rating instance with complete rating details including database identifiers. Used for retrieving ratings from the database without username information.
      Parameters:
      ratingID - database primary key
      userID - identifier of the user who submitted the rating
      laptopID - identifier of the rated laptop
      rating - numeric rating value
      review - text review content
      ratingDate - timestamp of when the rating was submitted
